---
title: "Appendix J"
---

**Land of Ta** – Tihran (Tehran). Identified as the "Mother of the world" and the "Dayspring of Light," this city is the birthplace of the Manifestation of God’s glory.

**Land of Baha** – Tihran (Tehran). This designation arises from the numerical equivalence between the letters of "Baha" and "T" (the first letter of Tihran) in the generative geometry of the Revelation.

**Land of Ya** – Yazd. Baha'u'llah addresses the people of this land, stating that "heedlessness hath seized all the inhabitants of earth save whom God... hath willed".

**Land of Za** – Zanjan. This region is described as being "leavened with pure blood," where thousands sacrificed their lives to "exalt the mighty, most great Cause".

**Land of Kha** – Khurasan. Baha'u'llah proclaims: "We hear from thee the voice of heroes, raised in glorification of thy Lord".

**Land of Sad** – Isfahan. This land is celebrated as the "repository of His names and attributes, next to the sacred and specially designated lands".

**Land of Mim** – Mazandaran. This is the ancestral homeland of Baha'u'llah, specifically the district of Nur, where the "Sun of Truth... ancient native soil" is found.

**Land of Qaf** – The Caucasus region. It is traditionally identified as the "nest of the Simurgh and dwelling of the Phoenix of the East".

**Isle of Qaf** – Cyprus. Designated in some contexts as "Satan's Isle," where the "Evil Whisperer" was relegated.

**Land of Qaf and Vav** – Quchan.

**Land of Kaf and Ra** – Karbila. This "land of Kaf and Ra" is a station which the ulamas of the past "failed during all this time to comprehend".

**Land of Ba** – Beirut. It is written: "Praise be to Him Who hath honored the Land of Ba (Beirut) through the presence of Him round Whom all names revolve".

**Zawra** – Baghdad. Designating the "Abode of Peace," it is the site of the "Most Great House of God" and the "City of God".

**Land of Mystery (Ard-i-Sirr)** – Adrianople (Edirne). Baha'u'llah prophesied that this land would "pass out of the hands of the king" and its "course of things shall be altered".

**Point between the Two Seas** – Constantinople (Istanbul). This refers to the city situated between the Mediterranean and the Black Sea, where "the throne of tyranny" was once established.

**Land of Ha and Mim** – Hamadan.

**Land of Fa** – Fars (Shiraz). In the Revelation of the Bayan, this land became the "dayspring of the lands," just as Mecca had been in the Revelation of the Furqan.

**Land of Shin** – Shiraz. As the birthplace of the Primal Point, its "nightingale’s song reached the seven climes" and its air is "joyous and exhilarating".

**White Spot / Holy Valley** – ‘Akka. Often termed the "Most Great Prison," this spot is also identified as the "Banquet-Hall of God" where the "Lord of Lords" arrived in truth.

**Land of Alif** – Adhirbayjan. Baha'u'llah addressed the "heroes" of this land, affirming that its mountain "also has its portion" of the Divine Revelation.

**Faran** – A region specifically named by the "Blessed Tongue" of Baha'u'llah. It is described as a clime where the "fire of divine love must surge so intensely that it brings warmth to all neighboring regions".

**Land of Alif and Ra** – Rasht and its surrounding territories.
